text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka didn't show up for training, so I'm out
looking for her...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Guess I took the corner a little too hot. I've gotta slow down more next time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it's been a while since I played a
motorcycle game. It was fun, but I wanna hurry up
and get back on the real th—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry, Trainer. I was close to setting a new
record and lost track of time...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'll be more careful next time! Catch ya later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka tries to run, but I catch her at the last
second and give her a stern talking-to.
